src: Run Windows apps such as Microsoft Office/Adobe in Linux (Ubuntu/Fedora) and GNOME/KDE as if they were a part of the native OS, including Nautilus integration. Hard fork of https://github.com/Fmstrat/winapps/
ja: Linux（Ubuntu/Fedora）でMicrosoft Office/AdobeなどのWindowsアプリをNautilusインテグレーション含めGNOME/KDEのネイティブOSの一部として実行。https://github.com/Fmstrat/winapps/ のハードフォーク
